meta.title: The Air Force is now adding AI pilots to combat-coded F-16s
meta.description:
The United States is officially installing artificial intelligence fighter pilots into a half dozen combat-coded F-16s, and the last of these testbed fighters just arrived in Eglin Air Force Base in Florida to get started. 

Watch our previous coverage on this program here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ghh-wf5NaQw&pp=ygULc2FuZGJveHggYWk%3D
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8isNMqSYJno&pp=ygUOc2FuZGJveHggdmVub20%3D
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JdT_ciaUeqo&pp=ygULc2FuZGJveHggYWk%3D
